creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Can't do anythng about it, because 2 depends don't build: 
x11-toolkits/p5-Gnome2-Canvas: 
http://sce-tindy.tecnik93.com/tb-exp/index.php?action=describe_port&id=1346 
and x11-toolkits/p5-Gnome2-VFS: 
http://sce-tindy.tecnik93.com/tb-exp/index.php?action=describe_port&id=1345 
for the same reason: Can't locate Cairo/Install/Files.pm in @INC . Both 
are unmaintained, maybe you can investigate this and perhaps take 
maintainership since your port needs both ?
